root_cause.description: The SSL certificate renewal on Sunday night deployed an incomplete certificate bundle to auth_service, missing the intermediate CA certificate. During low-traffic hours the issue was masked by connection reuse, but as Monday morning traffic increased, new TLS handshakes failed certificate chain validation, causing intermittent 503 errors from auth_service.

contributing_factors.factor: Incomplete certificate bundle missing intermediate CA cert
No automated certificate chain validation in deployment pipeline
Low overnight traffic masked the issue due to connection pooling/reuse

causal_chain: SSL certificate renewed and deployed Sunday night without intermediate CA
Low overnight traffic used existing connections, masking the problem
Monday morning traffic surge required new TLS connections
New connections failed certificate chain validation
auth_service returned 503 errors on failed handshakes
payment_gateway propagated errors as 500s to end users
Error rate scaled with traffic volume reaching 15%
